_comment: SERVICE REGISTRY — what each service IS, not what was released.
The environments/*.json ledgers record the released build (version/semver);
this records the static facts a deploy needs to pick the right pipeline.
Onboarding a new service = one entry here.
type       container | zip  — selects reusable-deploy vs reusable-deploy-zip.
repo       owner/repo of the service; deploys check this out at the
released sha so code, migrations and settings share one pin.
image_name container only: the ACR repository path.
